description: CITI is axed to reduce 10Y duration inventory and is likely to show a tighter offer.
JPM has neutral UST-10Y inventory and should quote close to profile.
GS wants to buy UST-10Y and is less competitive for a client BUY RFQ.
MS has higher balance-sheet cost for this duration bucket.
BARC is included for price discovery with outlier latency and spread.
